message:
test: Restructure all tests to run against wrangler dev with real DO pipeline

Replace vitest-pool-workers (fake inline WASM) with the real production path:
HTTP POST → Worker → PythonDO (RPC) → Asyncify → python.wasm → on_fetch()

- Add test/setup.ts globalSetup: bundles test project, starts wrangler dev
- Add test/helpers.ts: runPython() POSTs code to localhost:8787
- Add test/test-project/ with on_fetch handler that exec()s test code
- Add test/wrangler.toml with DO bindings + KV/R2/D1 test bindings
- Port all 15 test files from SELF.fetch() to runPython()
- Remove @cloudflare/vitest-pool-workers dependency
- Remove old fake workers (test/worker.ts, numpy-worker.ts, pydantic-worker.ts)
- Remove old wrangler configs (wrangler.jsonc, wrangler-pydantic.jsonc)
- Simplify CI workflow (remove numpy build steps, tests use wrangler dev)

@@ -25,7 +25,6 @@
     "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p cli/tsconfig.json"
   },
   "devDependencies": {
-    "@cloudflare/vitest-pool-workers": "^0.12.20",
     "@cloudflare/workers-types": "^4.20240512.0",

     "fflate": "^0.8.2",

@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+"""Test handler — executes Python code sent via POST through the full DO pipeline.
+
+Request flow:
+  HTTP POST code → Worker → PythonDO.handleRequest() (RPC) → Asyncify → python.wasm
+  → _handler.py → this module's on_fetch() → exec(code) → Response(stdout)
+"""
+
+import sys
+import io
+import traceback
+from pymode.workers import Request, Response, Env
+
+
+def on_fetch(request, env):
+    code = request.text()
+    if not code:
+        return Response("ready")
+
+    # Make env available to exec'd code so binding tests work
+    globals_dict = {"env": env, "__builtins__": __builtins__}
+
+    old_stdout = sys.stdout
+    sys.stdout = buf = io.StringIO()
+    try:
+        exec(compile(code, "<test>", "exec"), globals_dict)
+        output = buf.getvalue()
+        return Response(output, status=200)
+    except Exception:
+        output = buf.getvalue() + traceback.format_exc()
+        return Response(output, status=500)
+    finally:
+        sys.stdout = old_stdout

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+[project]
+name = "pymode-test"
+
+[tool.pymode]
+main = "main.py"

@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+# Test wrangler config — production worker + DOs + test bindings.
+# Used by: wrangler dev --config test/wrangler.toml
+name = "pymode-test"
+main = "../worker/src/worker.ts"
+compatibility_date = "2024-04-03"
+
+[[rules]]
+type = "CompiledWasm"
+globs = ["**/*.wasm"]
+
+[[rules]]
+type = "Data"
+globs = ["**/*.zip", "**/*.dat"]
+
+# Durable Objects — the full production architecture
+[durable_objects]
+bindings = [
+  { name = "TCP_POOL", class_name = "TcpPoolDO" },
+  { name = "PYTHON_DO", class_name = "PythonDO" },
+  { name = "THREAD_DO", class_name = "ThreadDO" },
+]
+
+[[migrations]]
+tag = "v1"
+new_classes = ["TcpPoolDO"]
+
+[[migrations]]
+tag = "v2"
+new_classes = ["PythonDO"]
+
+[[migrations]]
+tag = "v3"
+new_classes = ["ThreadDO"]
+
+# Test bindings — miniflare provides local in-memory implementations
+[[kv_namespaces]]
+binding = "MY_KV"
+id = "test-kv"
+
+[[r2_buckets]]
+binding = "MY_R2"
+bucket_name = "test-bucket"
+
+[[d1_databases]]
+binding = "MY_DB"
+database_name = "test-db"
+database_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
